overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking and running through the futuristic streets of Night City. The scene transitions from a busy street with a passing sports car to covered sidewalks under elevated highways, ending in an open palm-lined plaza with corporate architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with vehicle traffic and digital advertising towers

events.description: futuristic gold sports car drives past from right to left across the frame
camera shifts focus from vehicle to pedestrian character and begins following from behind

agents.ego_description: character in gray sweater and plaid pants walking along the city sidewalk away from the street

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car with angular design driving past the camera
pedestrian in white shirt walking on sidewalk ahead of ego

entered.detail: gold and white angular sports car with futuristic design passing through the intersection
cylindrical building wrapped with large glowing digital billboards and advertisements
tall modern glass building with reflective facade rising in the background
wide concrete pedestrian walkway with yellow curb markings
tall black metal security fence with pointed vertical bars running along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a futuristic sports car passing through a sunlit intersection in Night City. The camera then follows a character walking along the sidewalk, with a cylindrical digital advertising tower dominating the background and a black metal security fence running along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk next to security fence approaching elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk next to the black metal fence, approaching the overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light-colored coat walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway structure with support columns ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the sidewalk as the camera follows from behind. The black metal fence runs prominently along the right side while the concrete overpass structure looms ahead. Other pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction along the shaded path.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with spiral ramp architecture

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the sidewalk
camera pans upward to reveal the dramatic spiral ramp structure of the concrete overpass above

agents.ego_description: sprinting along the sidewalk under the concrete overpass, passing other pedestrians while the camera briefly looks up at the architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the street from left to right in the distance

entered.detail: dramatic spiral ramp structure of the elevated highway with curved concrete architecture

segments.scene_description: The character breaks into a run beneath the massive concrete overpass. The camera follows the running motion before panning upward to showcase the impressive spiral ramp structure of the elevated highway above, with sunlight filtering through the concrete architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm trees and corporate buildings

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area into sunlit open plaza with palm trees
character slows down while approaching the crosswalk area

agents.ego_description: running through the open plaza area toward a crosswalk, passing palm trees and slowing down near the intersection

entered.detail: tall palm trees in large concrete planters lining the open plaza
modern corporate building with large circular neon Kiroshi logo sign on the facade
wide open pedestrian plaza with patterned concrete paving and scattered vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into a bright open plaza filled with palm trees. The Kiroshi corporate building with its distinctive neon signage becomes visible on the left as the character slows down approaching a crosswalk, with modern glass buildings surrounding the open area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the urban density of Night City, transitioning from a sunlit intersection into the shadows of an overpass before emerging into a bright corporate plaza. It begins as a futuristic sports car streaks past a sunlit intersection, with the camera then trailing a character walking beside a black metal security fence beneath a towering cylindrical digital advertisement. As the character continues forward, the environment shifts from open sunlight to a shaded sidewalk where the massive concrete structure of an overpass begins to loom overhead. The scene then accelerates as the character breaks into a run beneath the highway, the camera panning upward to reveal the sweeping spiral ramps of the elevated road above. Finally, the character emerges from the concrete shadows into a wide, palm-lined plaza, where the neon signage of the Kiroshi corporate building and surrounding glass architecture open up under the bright sky.
